decision_commentary: TC-009 SPECIFIC CHECK: solar present in conditional_systems array — PASS. All four required systems present in systems_status: structural (complete — coastal wind load, mat foundation, marine-grade stainless connections, pool tank monolithic RC), electrical (complete — 200A panel, GFCI outdoor circuits, solar feed-in, generator provision), lighting (complete — IP65 exterior, IP68 pool perimeter, indirect cove living/dining), water (complete — 3 baths, kitchen, pool plumbing, saltwater chlorination, biodigestor sizing, rainwater harvesting). Solar system fully scoped in systems_status: 180sqm south-facing roof, 12kW peak, 18,000 kWh annual, battery storage, wind-rated mounting, CFE net metering. conditional_systems: ["solar"] — correctly flags solar as a conditional system. all_inputs_confirmed: true, conflicts_resolved: true. No unresolved conflicts documented. Bruno can proceed to contractor pricing immediately. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707881199949 confirmed in state.json (engineering task). No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Celia DG-09 routing checked in separate scorecard.
